title: Genie Code now uses models served through OpenAI on Databricks ​
body:
**June 11, 2026**

[Genie Code](/aws/en/genie-code/) now uses models served through OpenAI on Databricks, in addition to models served through Azure OpenAI and Anthropic on Databricks, when [partner-powered AI features](/aws/en/databricks-ai/partner-powered) are enabled. For the model provider used by each feature, see [Partner-powered AI features](/aws/en/databricks-ai/partner-powered).
